density.description: Controls body row padding density. Defaults to `'comfortable'`.

stickyHeader.description: Keeps the column header row pinned to the top edge while scrolling. Defaults to `true`.

virtualizeRows.description: Enables fixed-height row virtualization. Columns still render fully.

rowHeight.description: Fixed body-row pixel height used by row virtualization. Defaults to 44 when omitted or invalid.

columnSizing.description: Overrides resolved column widths by column key.

selectionMode.description: Controls row-selection behavior. Cell focus and range selection remain available.

class.description: Additional class names merged onto the root grid.

unsupportedProps.name: columnPinning
unsupportedProps.description: Pins supplied column keys to the left or right edge.

unsupportedProps.name: getRowAriaLabel
unsupportedProps.description: Optional accessible row label for screen-reader row summaries.

unsupportedProps.name: getRowId
unsupportedProps.description: Stable row identity used for ARIA ids and row-scoped state.

unsupportedProps.name: onSelectionModelChange
unsupportedProps.description: Called when row selection changes through cell interaction.

unsupportedProps.name: onSortModelChange
unsupportedProps.description: Called after the user changes sort order and DataGrid updates `sortModel`.

unsupportedProps.name: rowClass
unsupportedProps.description: Additional class names for body rows.

unsupportedProps.name: sortModel
unsupportedProps.description: Controls the row sort order used to render rows.
